description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low wall covered in greenery, featuring a flat roof and large rectangular windows. The front facade includes a prominent garage with a car parked inside, a set of steps leading to the main entrance, and a lush vine-covered exterior. The backyard is landscaped with a grassy area, a large tree, a swimming pool, and a patio with outdoor furniture. The upper floor has a balcony or terrace with glass railings, providing an open view of the garden below. The house is predominantly white, with clean lines and minimalistic design elements, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The property is enclosed, offering privacy and a blend of natural and built environments.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior is accented by greenery and a surrounding wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance steps, and vine-covered facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a pool, patio, and large tree.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the garden, tree, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Side view showing the yard, patio, and the house's clean lines and windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a simple door, and a garage integrated into the facade, accented by vine-covered walls.
